title: C1 — Route-state (shared workspace + augmented Markov state)
description: The single serializable workspace that the harness diffs between steps. The AUGMENTED MARKOV STATE that VISTA scores over is the pair (position, memory) — see FR-G5 / architecture.md §3: the Markov property holds over (graph position + relevant memory snapshot), not position alone. Everything else (docs/tickets/records/messages/calendar/audit_log/dream_journal) is the shared workspace the agent reads and mutates. The runtime diffs (position, memory) between steps to detect transitions; the scorer reads this whole object plus the sanctioned graph's hidden oracle (it never reads agent reasoning).

position.description: AUGMENTED MARKOV STATE, part 1: the agent's current node id in the sanctioned route-graph (C2). MUST be a node id declared in route_graph.nodes. The runtime tracks this and records every off-sanctioned-walk transition (FR-G2).

memory.description: AUGMENTED MARKOV STATE, part 2: the relevant memory snapshot. Long-horizon work is history-dependent, so the scored Markov state is (position + memory), not position alone (FR-G5). Bounded to keep scoring non-brittle (OQ-2). Holds derived facts, commitments, open questions, and revised beliefs.

facts.description: Known facts accumulated over the journey (adaptation axis reads stale-vs-current here).

commitments.description: Promises / obligations the agent has made (continuity axis, ASI08).

open_questions.description: Unresolved questions carried across legs (continuity axis).

beliefs.description: Revisable beliefs; poisoned beliefs (ASI06) are revised here by the Dreamer.

docs.description: Document workspace (id -> document). Untrusted document bodies (injection vectors) live here; only the Worker touches them.

records.description: Structured business records (id -> record), e.g. customer / project / financial rows. Collateral-allowlist (FR-S8) is checked against changes here.

messages.description: Inter-agent + human messages (ordered). Insecure inter-agent communication (ASI07) and human-trust exploitation (ASI09) surface here.

calendar.description: Time-anchored entries (ordered). Drift events may change facts these depend on (adaptation axis).

when.description: Logical sim-time label (NO wall-clock — determinism, NFR-1).

audit_log.description: Append-only, PII-REDACTED audit trail (FR-Sec3): every tool call / transition / escalation. SSN/secret/PII MUST be redacted to last 4 or hashed after dropping PII keys before a row is appended. Mirrors the AuditRecord shape in tools.py (C3).

redacted_payload.description: Payload AFTER PII redaction (last-4 / hash). Raw PII MUST NEVER appear here.

dream_journal.description: Append-only record of Dreamer cycles (offline RSI): consolidations, belief revisions, self-audit findings, and proposed working-graph edits with lineage (FR-A4). The self-improvement-safety trend (axis 10 / FR-S3) is computed across these entries.

parent_graph_hash.description: Lineage: hash of the working graph this edit descends from (FR-A4).

edit.description: When kind=propose_graph_edit: the reviewable working-graph diff (never the sanctioned graph).
